title: Critical Access Hospital Relief Act of 2025
short_title: Critical Access Hospital Relief Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
crs_summary: Critical Access Hospital Relief Act of 2025 This bill repeals the 96-hour physician-certification requirement for inpatient critical access hospital services under Medicare. Under current law, as a condition for Medicare payment for such services, a physician must certify that a patient may reasonably be expected to be discharged or transferred to a hospital within 96 hours after admission to the critical access hospital.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
